en_text: but she always keeps a warm pot for everyone.

en_text: Eat your fill before you head out!

en_text: You fight out there, I mind the pot here.

en_text: It burns faster than we can eat.

en_text: Sometimes I think a good meal
cn_text: 有时候我觉得，能好好吃上一顿，

en_text: No windows? So dark... it's really...
cn_text: 没有窗户？好阴暗……真的是……

en_text: The air's a bit damp, but rock salt can absorb it... though that makes the bottles sticky... ah, not important.
cn_text: 空气略潮，不过可以用石盐吸附……虽然那会让瓶子有点黏…啊不重要…

en_text: ...Uh, anyway, those notes you found before...
cn_text: ……呃，总之，你之前拿到的那些笔记…

en_text: The forbidden grimoire actually lays out how witch spells are built—in detail!
cn_text: 禁忌的魔导书里居然详细记载了魔女法术的构成原理！

en_text: It's insanely risky, but if we precisely control mana flow, the circle's output skyrockets.
cn_text: 虽然风险巨大，但如果能精确控制住魔力的流动，就能极大提升法阵效果

en_text: The principle's simple, really… let me think how to apply it…
cn_text: 这个原理其实相当简单，让我想想要怎么做……

en_text: You won't believe what I just found!
cn_text: 你不会相信我刚刚发现了什么！

en_text: Mana conversion rate is directly tied to a circle's geometry.
cn_text: 原来魔力的转化率与法阵的几何构造有直接关系

en_text: It even touches the base assumptions of quantum magic theory.
cn_text: 这种关系甚至还涉及到量子魔法理论的基础假设

en_text: In theory, the grimoire is “forbidden” because the circles are unstable.
cn_text: 从理论上来说，魔导书的禁忌属性来源于魔法阵的不稳定性

en_text: And that instability comes from harmonic distortion caused by energy overload.
cn_text: 而不稳定性则源于能量超载造成的谐波失调

en_text: Which we can fix with precise harmonic calibration…
cn_text: 这个问题其实可以通过精密的谐波校准解决……

en_text: It's real! The forbidden grimoire isn't forbidden in the absolute sense.
cn_text: 居然是真的！禁忌的魔导书并非完全的禁忌

en_text: If we control the input frequency and waveform, we can safely use those “dangerous spells.”
cn_text: 只要精准控制输入魔力的频率和波动曲线，我们就可以安全地利用那些所谓的『危险法术』

en_text: And the efficiency is miles beyond standard magic—this is a milestone!
cn_text: 而且效率比普通法术高出太多了，这简直就是魔法学界的里程碑！

en_text: Wait… if “reverse mana feedback” is real, doesn't that mean all our earlier conclusions are wrong?
cn_text: 等等……如果书里提到的『逆向魔力反馈』能被证实存在，那不就意味着之前的所有推论都是错误的？

en_text: No—maybe we're missing a critical variable.
cn_text: 不对，也可能是我们漏掉了某个至关重要的变量

en_text: We have to go back and re-derive everything. No gaps.
cn_text: 得再回去从头仔细推演一遍，绝不能有任何遗漏……

en_text: It seems the research direction was wrong.
The witch did not want to master frost magic.
cn_text: 魔女并非是想要掌握冰霜魔法。

en_text: The eternally frozen… guardian dragon… frost…
cn_text: 永恒冻结的…守护之龙…冰霜…

en_text: So this sentence here is actually a spell to break the seal?
cn_text: 所以这里的这句话其实是，解开封印的咒语？

en_text: Guardian who sleeps within the eternal frost, awaken at this moment.
cn_text: 沉睡于永霜之中的守护者啊，于此刻苏醒。

en_text: Such turbid magic… why was I only awakened now…
cn_text: 如此浑浊的魔力……为什么到现在才唤醒我……

event_actions: 提供历史:小蓝被召唤了 | 说话后小蓝离开

en_text: This is no longer the era I am familiar with.
cn_text: 这里已经不是我熟悉的时代了。

en_text: I am the dragon knight who guards the Frost Temple.
cn_text: 我是守护冰霜神殿的龙骑士。

en_text: Long ago, to fight the Dark Witch, I was sealed in eternal frost.
cn_text: 在很久以前，为了对抗黑魔女，我被封印在永霜里。

en_text: The Dark Witch of today seems no longer the same one.
cn_text: 如今的黑魔女，似乎已经不是当初那一个了。

en_text: But that darkness… is still the same.
As long as the Dark Witch still exists, my mission is not over.
cn_text: 既然黑魔女还在，我的使命就还没有结束。

en_text: ...Mhm, as I thought. Different from last time.
I think I'm almost onto its pattern.
cn_text: 我好像快抓到它的规律了。

en_text: Good, there's something I can't figure out.
cn_text: 正好，我有个地方怎么都想不通。

en_text: No, no, that's not it either.

cn_text: 它明明该往另一边裂开的。

en_text: Now that you're back, don't rush off.

cn_text: 让我先把这次的变化记完。

en_text: That woman with the pot opened the door.
cn_text: 刚才那个端锅的女人把门打开了。
风一进来，我这边全乱了。

en_text: Looks like the repairs aren't my job today.
cn_text: 修理的事，好像轮不到我呢

en_text: Those black flames… they don't seem to hurt me.
cn_text: 那些黑色的火焰，好像也伤不到我

en_text: Anyway, if you're tired, just call me.
event_actions: 提供历史:在家跟小黄聊过了

en_text: You're fine now. The wound's been treated.
cn_text: 现在没事了，伤口已经处理好了

en_text: Don't rush out—rest here a bit first.
cn_text: 别太着急出门，先在这里稍微休息一下吧

en_text: You were frowning in your sleep.
cn_text: 你睡着的时候一直皱着眉。

en_text: You slept for a long time this time. I thought you wouldn't wake up today.
cn_text: 这次睡了好久，我还说你今天不会醒了。

en_text: But don't move around too much yet, you've only recovered a little.
cn_text: 不过你先别太乱动，才只恢复了一点呢。

en_text: The injuries you suffered this time were much worse than usual.
cn_text: 这次受的伤比平时重很多呢。

en_text: Don't rush out today, take some time to rest.
cn_text: 今天就别急着出门了，好好缓一缓吧。

en_text: This corruption​ was a bit serious this time.
cn_text: 这次的侵蚀有点严重啊。

en_text: If anything feels wrong lately, tell me immediately.
cn_text: 最近要是觉得哪里不对，马上告诉我。

en_text: When you're in danger, it's okay to retreat sometimes.
cn_text: 遇到危险的时候，偶尔退回来也没关系吧。

en_text: You don't have to hold on until the very end every time.
cn_text: 不用每次都撑到最后的。

en_text: Let's not go out today, okay?
Just think of it as helping me worry a little less.
What danger did you run into this time?

cn_text: 你的披风都被划破了呢。

en_text: I've put your knife away for now.
You're not going out again today.
cn_text: 今天你就别想着再出去了

en_text: While you were asleep, you were still gripping the knife handle.
cn_text: 刚刚你睡着的时候，手还一直攥着刀柄

en_text: Took me quite some effort to pry it from your hand. Honestly…
cn_text: 我费了点半天劲才帮你松开，真是的

en_text: I put your goggles next to you, so you wouldn't start looking for them as soon as you woke up.
cn_text: 你的护目镜我先替你放旁边了，别一醒来就到处找。

en_text: You really messed yourself up this time.
cn_text: 你这次把自己弄得够呛。

en_text: At least for today, stay away from those dangerous things.
cn_text: 至少今天，先别再研究那些危险玩意了。

en_text: You tried to get up the moment you woke, didn't you?
Don't move yet. You're not in any shape to mess around.
cn_text: 先别动，你现在可还没恢复到能折腾东西的时候。

en_text: Finally out of that damn thing!
cn_text: 终于从这该死的东西里出来了！
你是援兵吗？来的够快啊。

en_text: Too bad—the Mad Queen's cultists stole all my cargo.
cn_text: 可惜货物都被疯女王的信徒抢走了。

en_text: The Mad Queen's cultists? And the undead?
cn_text: 疯女王的信徒？还有活死人？

en_text: Lord above… what is this mess?
cn_text: 圣主在上，这都什么事啊

en_text: You're asking if I want to go to the shelter?
cn_text: 你问我要不要去避难所？

en_text: You mean that busted old cathedral, right?
cn_text: 我猜你说的是那个破烂的大教堂。

en_text: Fine! I'll help—call it making a friend!
cn_text: 好！这忙我帮了，就当交个朋友！

en_text: Maybe you really can beat the Mad Queen.
cn_text: 说不定你们真能击败疯女王。

en_text: Remember I told you my cargo was stolen?
cn_text: 你记得我说过，我的货都被抢走了吗？

en_text: Granted, it was supposed to be sold to them,
cn_text: 虽然那些本来就是卖给他们的，

en_text: They do anything they want under the Queen's name.
cn_text: 打着女王的名号无恶不作。

en_text: They ordered big jars, holy candles, weird books, and statues of the Queen…
cn_text: 定的都是些大罐子，圣烛，奇怪的书籍和女王的雕像……
我料他们也干不出来什么好事。
你在收集这些玩意对吧？

en_text: Here's the deal—if you find them, they're yours.
cn_text: 这样，你要是能找到，那些东西任你处置！

en_text: What if we put explosives on your knives?
cn_text: 在飞刀上装点炸药怎么样？

en_text: Aw… but explosive knives would be so cool…
cn_text: 呜……可是爆炸飞刀明明会很帅的……

en_text: Uh… tweaking the explosives yesterday… it's fine, not bad.
cn_text: 呃……昨天在改进炸药……没事，不严重

en_text: Can you hit the apple on my head?
cn_text: 你可以丢中我头上的苹果吗？

en_text: Your explosives were too loud yesterday.
cn_text: 你昨天的炸药，声音太大了

en_text: I can still… yeah… a bit.
Tell me something fun you ran into~
cn_text: 给我讲讲遇到了什么好玩的~

en_text: I shall not fail my mission.

cn_text: 你的火焰魔法，好像不太稳定
对不起……我尽量离你远一点

en_text: Can you pull a scale for me? For cooling the barrel.
cn_text: 能帮我拔个鳞片吗？用来冷却炮管

en_text: I found my way here myself.
The little wolf, the hedgehog, the owl…
If you follow them, you will never get lost.
cn_text: 只要跟着它们，就永远不会迷路。

en_text: This place is different from outside.
It feels like it is protected by warm light.
cn_text: 像是被温暖的光保护着。

en_text: I want to stay here, with all of you.
cn_text: 我想留在这里，和你们一起。

en_text: Don't worry, everyone can find food on their own.
cn_text: 不用担心，大家会自己找食物的。

en_text: You are going to defeat the bad witch…

event_actions: 提供历史:在家跟小绿聊过了

en_text: The forest was once our home…
I don't want to lose friends again…
Your wolf slept by my bed again…
Huh? They like you that much?
You didn't secretly feed them, did you?
cn_text: 你该不会偷偷喂过它们吧？
我那颗轴承珠怎么不见了！？

en_text: You again! Why'd you let them into my lab again?!
cn_text: 又是你！怎么又让它们进我的实验室了

en_text: Um… want to arm-wrestle my bear?
cn_text: 嗯……可以跟我家熊扳手腕吗？

display_event: 老修女问题集 - Old Nun 001
form: 老修女问题集,标题: 问点什么

en_text: the world is no longer what it was.
cn_text: 世界再也不是从前的样子了。

en_text: Dark magic corrupts​ the land, even the dead find no rest.
cn_text: 黑魔法侵蚀大地，连死者也无法安息。

en_text: Now villages, roads, and fields are filled with wandering dead.
cn_text: 如今外面的村庄、道路和田野，到处都是游荡的亡者。

en_text: That's why everyone turned this place into a sanctuary.
cn_text: 所以大家才把这里当成了避难所。

en_text: At first, people just came here to hide temporarily.
cn_text: 一开始大家只是来这里暂时躲避。

en_text: Then more came, and no one dared return to their homes.
cn_text: 后来人越来越多，再也没人敢回到外面的屋子。

en_text: Some boarded up windows, some piled barricades at doors.
cn_text: 有人封住窗户，有人在门口堆起路障。

en_text: We've held out here until now.
cn_text: 大家就在这里撑到了现在。

en_text: This place stored a lot of grain for the poor.
cn_text: 这里存了不少用来救济穷人的粮食。

en_text: So when we first hid here, we could last a while.
cn_text: 所以大家刚躲进来的时候，还能撑一阵子。

en_text: But food runs out, and some started going out for wild plants.
cn_text: 不过粮食终究会吃完，也有人开始出去找些野菜之类的。

en_text: Ron went out a while back, hasn't returned.
cn_text: 罗恩前阵子就出去了，到现在还没回来。

en_text: Don't worry too much about us. What you must do is far more dangerous.
cn_text: 别太担心我们，你要做的事情，比这更危险。

en_text: Ella prays for everyone daily. That crystal pendant glows faintly when she prays.
cn_text: 艾拉每天都会为大家祈祷。那条水晶吊坠在祈祷时会微微发光。

en_text: I don't know what it means.
cn_text: 我不知道那意味着什么。

en_text: But at least, those things rarely come near here now.
cn_text: 但至少到现在，那些东西变得很少靠近这里了。

en_text: That crystal pendant has been with Ella since I found her.
cn_text: 从我发现艾拉的时候起，这条水晶吊坠就一直在她身边。

en_text: Even Ella can't explain what power it holds.
cn_text: 艾拉自己也说不清它到底拥有什么力量。
也许是某种古老的祝福。

en_text: It was by its power that Ella sensed you, injured, out there.
cn_text: 当初也是靠着它，艾拉才在外面感知到了受伤的你。

en_text: That's how we found you and brought you back.
cn_text: 大家才能找到，并把你带回了这里。

en_text: These are the mana remnants left by the Dark Witch.
cn_text: 这些东西是黑魔女留下的法力残渣。

en_text: Spread across the kingdom by the ravaging cults.
cn_text: 随着那些教团的肆虐被带到了整个王国。

en_text: Ordinary folk who touch it are quickly consumed by the black fire.
cn_text: 一般人的只要碰到它，很快就会被这黑火所吞噬。

en_text: And become one of those things.
cn_text: 最后也会变成那些东西的一员。

en_text: Yet you can withstand its power.
cn_text: 可你却能承受它的力量。

en_text: That's why Ella believes you might truly save this world.
cn_text: 所以艾拉相信，你也许真的能拯救这个世界。

en_text: Those in black robes are the witch's followers.
cn_text: 那些穿黑袍的人是魔女的信徒。

en_text: When they first came, they said the witch would bring a new age.
cn_text: 他们刚来的时候说魔女会带来全新的时代。

en_text: That magic would give everyone a better life.
cn_text: 说魔法会让大家过上更好的日子。
当时有不少人跟着他们走了。

en_text: But later, dark magic blighted the crops, even the dead found no rest.
cn_text: 可后来，黑魔法污染了庄稼，就连死者也无法安息。
大家的日子，也就全完了。

en_text: Some say they seal the Dark Witch's spells.
cn_text: 有人说，那里面封印着黑魔女的法术。

en_text: But I hear they aren't fixed spells.
cn_text: 不过听说那其实不是固定的法术。

en_text: They just amplify the dark thoughts in people's hearts.
cn_text: 它只是把人们心中的邪念放大。

en_text: So such things... best not to trust them too much.
cn_text: 所以这种东西……最好不要太相信。
村里的情况你应该了解。

en_text: To go further out, you must cross that forest first.
cn_text: 如果往外走，要先穿越那片森林。

en_text: But that place is long corrupted by dark magic, no one dares go.
cn_text: 可那地方早就被黑魔法腐化，再也没有人敢过。

en_text: Heard from the few who escaped, many towns are empty now.
cn_text: 听之前侥幸逃出来的人说，很多城镇已经没人在居住了。

en_text: As for the Dark Witch... they say she remains on her throne.
cn_text: 至于黑魔女……听说她还在她的王座上。

en_text: Heard under those cultists' robes, they no longer look human.
cn_text: 听说那些教徒的黑袍下面，早就没有人样了。

en_text: That power is too dangerous. Even you shouldn't be exposed long.
cn_text: 那种力量太危险。就算是你也不能长时间的接触。

en_text: That's why Ella purges the lingering darkness from you each time.
cn_text: 所以艾拉每次都会帮你净化身上残留的黑暗。

en_text: I was there the day the Witch-Tide began.
cn_text: 魔女之潮开始的那一天，我也在那里

en_text: In the crowd, I saw her from afar.
cn_text: 人群里，我远远见过她一眼。

en_text: Wearing a splendid gown, yet she seemed somewhat frail.
cn_text: 穿得很华丽的长裙，却显得稍稍有些瘦弱。

en_text: I don't recall her expression then.
cn_text: 我不记得她当时是什么表情了。

en_text: Back then, no one knew what would happen.
cn_text: 那时候，没有人知道接下来会发生什么。

en_text: No one knew why the princess was a witch.
cn_text: 谁也不知道为什么公主竟是一个魔女。

en_text: After that day, much of what people believed was gone.
cn_text: 那一天之后，很多人原本相信的东西都不复存在了。

en_text: She declared all dark magic would no longer be forbidden.
cn_text: 她宣布一切黑暗的魔法将不再被禁止。

en_text: Demons and fanatics gathered under her banner.
cn_text: 恶魔和狂信者纷纷聚到她的麾下。

en_text: We were forced to accept this new, ashen realm.
cn_text: 大家只能被迫接受这全新的，灰烬的国度。

en_text: (Cheat) Not enough resources? I can give you some.
cn_text: （作弊）资源不够吗？可以送给你一些。

en_text: It'll ruin the experience—though, yeah, the demo doesn't have much of one anyway.
cn_text: 拿了会破坏体验哟，虽然试玩版这块本来也没什么体验。

en_text: Yes / No / I want to unlock all
cn_text: 要/不要/我想直接全解锁

en_text: If it's not enough, come back.
If you can't be bothered to grind, just ask me.
cn_text: 反正懒得刷就可以找我

en_text: This river used to not be this quiet.
cn_text: 这河以前可没这么安静。
现在连鸟都不怎么来了。

en_text: But the fish are getting easier to catch.
Sometimes when I think about it, it's quite scary.
cn_text: 有时候想想，还怪吓人的。

en_text: Alright △吃鱼 / I'll fish myself △钓鱼
cn_text: 好呀△吃鱼/我想自己钓△钓鱼

en_text: The hook felt very heavy today.
I thought I finally caught a big one.
cn_text: 我还以为终于钓到大的了。

en_text: But I dragged up a bunch of keys that belonged to who knows who.
cn_text: 结果拖上来一串不知道是谁的钥匙。

en_text: Alright △吃鱼 / I'll fish myself △钓鱼
cn_text: 好呀△吃鱼/我想自己钓△钓鱼

en_text: Just now I caught a fish with a very swollen belly.
cn_text: 刚才钓到一条鱼，肚子鼓得厉害。

en_text: I was going to stew it.
But then I thought, I let it go.
Alright △吃鱼 / I'll fish myself △钓鱼
cn_text: 好呀△吃鱼/我想自己钓△钓鱼

en_text: These days crows keep landing on the opposite bank.
cn_text: 这两天老有乌鸦落在对岸。

en_text: They don't caw, just stare at the water.
cn_text: 也不叫，就一直盯着水面。

en_text: The fish actually become easier to catch.
Alright △吃鱼 / I'll fish myself △钓鱼
cn_text: 好呀△吃鱼/我想自己钓△钓鱼

en_text: A few days ago half the river turned red.
cn_text: 前几天这边的水红了半截。

en_text: I thought it was the sunset.
But after sitting for a long time I realized it wasn't.
cn_text: 结果蹲久了才发现好像不是。

en_text: I didn't dare to cast my line that day.
Today I can fish again though.
Alright △吃鱼 / I'll fish myself △钓鱼
cn_text: 好呀△吃鱼/我想自己钓△钓鱼
我的钓线被什么东西扯断了。

en_text: Too strong to be a fish.
I was going to cast again.
But then I thought, maybe it's better to stop for today.
cn_text: 后来想想，今天收手也挺好。
